name: Nine Sols RPG 2.0
description:
Hello all.

Lorebook Update: I have compiled most of the tokens of this bot into a lorebook, thus vastly lowering the total token cost. This should allow the bot to remember much finer details and have a better sense of where locations are. Enjoy~

The lorebook contains locations, characters, items, concepts, and enemies from the game.

I ask only for your patience, for this is my first bot and it certainly isn't a simple one. I recommend using a Proxy.

Follow its instructions and you should find everything you need.

Given my inexperience, I ask you let me know of any inconsistencies you find within the bot. I will remedy them when I can, and if they are small, you should be able to fix them yourself by remind the bot what is true.

Be patient. Be creative. Be excellent.
creator: AltairAstrium
